detaileddescription.para: NOTE: this function relies on Col::operator=(text), to change vec_state as well as swapping n_rows and n_cols, and Mat::init(), to check that the given vector will not have a different size than fixed_n_elem.

detaileddescription.para: NOTE: this function relies on Col::operator=(text), to change vec_state as well as swapping n_rows and n_cols, and Mat::init(), to check that the given vector will not have a different size than fixed_n_elem.
